parameters.text:
=🔴 CRITICAL RISK ALERT — DOCTOR NOTIFICATION

Dear Doctor,

A patient requires your IMMEDIATE attention.

PATIENT INFORMATION

Age:        {{ $json.body.patient_age }}
Report ID:  #{{ $json.body.report_id }}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
RISK ASSESSMENT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Risk Score:      {{ $json.body.risk_score }}%  ← CRITICAL
Disease Type:    {{ $json.body.disease_type }}
Potential Risks: {{ $json.body.potential_diseases }}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
